summary: Classified the hydrated open candidates plus the security-linked #39582. The closed representative #41105 is obsolete; #39772 is the current canonical open Telegram reply-to/deleted-message path. No close actions are planned because the remaining open PRs are related or independent active work, broad/blocked, or require product-direction review; closed candidates are skipped and #39582 is routed to security.
